title: dryopteris elegantula
intro: Dryopteris elegantula, also known as the Elegant Lady Fern or Wood Fern, is a species of fern native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris elegantula include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
